untranslatable_reason: The signal requires calculating Z-Score as (price - moving_average) / moving_standard_deviation and sizing positions proportional to the negative Z-Score. This requires: (1) a custom moving standard deviation calculation not available in the allowed indicators list, and (2) dynamic position sizing based on a computed Z-Score value. The allowed indicators do not include moving_standard_deviation, and position sizing cannot be expressed as a simple 3-field condition rule. The half-life value for lookback period is also not specified. Approximated entry/exit using price vs SMA crossovers as a fallback, but this does not capture the linear mean reversion mechanism.
translation_notes: Signal requires custom Z-Score calculation and dynamic position sizing. Approximated with SMA crossover reversal logic only. True implementation needs: movingStd indicator, Z-Score computation capability, and position_size parameter linked to calculated Z-Score value. The exact half-life lookback period is undefined in source material.
